nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: Mindoro bulbul
nodes.summary: Mindoro bulbul（Mindoro bulbul，学名 Hypsipetes mindorensis），主要分布于國際自然保護聯盟，常见栖息地包括山地森林，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、森林砍伐。

nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: 國際自然保護聯盟
nodes.summary: 國際自然保護聯盟是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联43种鸟类，包括绿翅雁、Stubble quail、菲律賓鴉鵑等43种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It inhabits mainly tropical moist lowland forest but has been known to inhabit moist montane forest up to 2,000 meters above sea level, and has been to known to visit cultivated areas. The International Union for Conservation of Nature does not yet recognize the Mindoro bulbul as its own species yet

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It inhabits mainly tropical moist lowland forest but has been known to inhabit moist montane forest up to 2,000 meters above sea level, and has been to known to visit cultivated areas. The International Union for Conservation of Nature does not yet recognize the Mindoro bulbul as its own species yet

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The forests of Mindoro threatened by habitat loss through legal and illegal logging, mining, road construction, slash-and-burn or kaingin and trapping for both food and the pet trade

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The forests of Mindoro threatened by habitat loss through legal and illegal logging, mining, road construction, slash-and-burn or kaingin and trapping for both food and the pet trade
